---
title: ""
---


Hello visitors! Welcome to my personal page!

## **About me:**

I am a PhD student in the Department of Mathematics and Statistics at UMBC.

My research interest involves statistical inference on graphs and networks, particularly in the context of clustering and community detection.

I am also very interested in statistical education and developing educational tools using R and Shinny.

In my free time, I enjoy reading, cooking, traveling and playing fantasy football/basketball.

Email: [fazizi1\@umbc.edu](mailto:fazizi1@umbc.edu){.email}\
GitHub: <https://github.com/fredazizi>
